stemHtml: To assess aircraft performance, the pilot must…

options.a: know the planned take-off, en-route and landing mass, and any subsequent changes from the load and trim documentation.
options.b: know the mass of the aircraft at the previous landing and add the mass of the uplifted fuel.
options.c: only use the certified mass information from the Aircraft Flight Manual.
options.d: assess the actual zero fuel mass from the load and trim documentation and check that it does not exceed the certified limit.
